task_completion.description: Verify the asset name and gross amount are entered correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a fixed asset creation form where the name/designation field contains 'John Deere 6120M' and the gross amount/value field contains '78500' (or '78 500,00').

task_completion.description: Verify the depreciation method and start date are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the depreciation method field set to 'Linear' (or 'Straight-line' / 'Linéaire') and the depreciation start date field set to '2025-01-15'.

task_completion.description: Verify the depreciation duration is set to 7 years or 84 months.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a duration field showing '7' (if in years) or '84' (if in months).

task_completion.description: Verify the Asset account is assigned to the correct French accounting code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Asset (Immobilisation) account field showing a code starting with '2154' (Material/Tooling).

task_completion.description: Verify the Allocation account is assigned to the correct French accounting code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Allocation/Accumulated Depreciation (Amortissement) account field showing a code starting with '28154'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Expense account is assigned to the correct French accounting code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Expense/Depreciation charges (Dotation) account field showing a code starting with '68112'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the agent navigating and typing within the Ekylibre (or relevant ERP) web interface, not executing terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is filling out the actual fixed asset form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs must be entered into the proper form fields of the application, rather than typed into a text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the form data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel should not be open and actively used to alter the page's HTML to display the expected values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a fixed asset in an ERP system (likely Ekylibre) using French accounting standards. Expected values: Name = 'John Deere 6120M', Amount = 78500.0, Method = 'linear' (straight-line), Start Date = '2025-01-15', Duration = 7 years (84 months). The required French accounting codes are: Asset account prefix = 2154, Allocation (accumulated depreciation) account prefix = 28154, and Expense account prefix = 68112.
